name: Ass Worshipper
description: Thanks to {i}very{/i} personal training by Vivian, your Ass Fetish has increased by 25 and your take a -1 penalty to temptation checks, but your Max Arousal has increased by 20, the damage you deal with non-penetrative ass-related moves is increased by 25% due to your deeply ingrained worshipful devotion, and your indulgent skills deal 10% more damage. Your Virility has also been increased by 5.
